title: Leak Location Report
description: Leak location inspection report with property details, service scope, wet area testing, photos, leak cause, required works, and plumber observations.

fields.label: Inspection Time
fields.additionalDetails: Enter inspection time in HH:MM format.

fields.label: Scope of Services Provided
fields.additionalDetails: Use short bullet points for each service performed.

fields.label: Areas Tested
fields.additionalDetails: Select each area included in this leak location inspection.
